\tzpentry{ID11377}{Hyperspherical Hubble Velocity Law}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
In the breathing hypersphere model, apparent recession velocity equals the Hubble rate times proper distance.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
v = H_{0}D
